failedAssertions.reason: The real CLI misclassified a representative `.m` file and a real Nginx `conf.d/site.conf` file, so canonical extension/runtime detection is incomplete.
Representative Svelte and Astro searches returned only block chunks with no extracted function symbols.
Nginx stats miscounted a fixture with two Nginx configs and one INI file as `nginx=1` / `ini=2`.
Sampled new-language `--lang` filters returned empty arrays while the same hits were only accessible as `language: "unknown"`.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The assigned real-user CLI surface exposes indexing/search behavior only and does not reveal unit-test inventory or coverage data, so test-coverage assertions could not be confirmed in-scope.

appliedUpdates.description: Added language-expansion setup notes recording the working release-binary path and the fact that `vera stats` must be run from the indexed fixture directory because it has no `--index-dir` flag.

notes: No long-running services or seed data were required because language-expansion validation used the release CLI surface only.
Three isolated CLI validators ran in parallel: metadata/docs (read-only repo inspection), a representative language matrix fixture, and an Nginx-focused fixture.

Local-mode validation used `/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/target/release/vera`, `ORT_DYLIB_PATH=/tmp/vera-onnxruntime-1.24.4/lib/libonnxruntime.so`, and isolated HOME directories symlinked to the existing model cache.
